mapper.sql: select r.request_id, r.request_no, r.student_user_id, coalesce(p.real_name, su.nick_name, su.user_name) as student_name, p.student_no, p.class_id, cls.class_name, r.target_class_course_id, cc.teaching_class_code as target_teaching_class_code, cc.course_id as target_course_id, cc.course_name as target_course_name, cc.class_id as target_class_id, cc.class_name as target_class_name, cc.teacher_id as target_teacher_id, coalesce(tu.nick_name, tu.user_name) as target_teacher_name, cc.term_id, cc.term_name, r.request_type, r.request_reason, r.request_status, r.review_remark, r.review_user_id, coalesce(ru.nick_name, ru.user_name) as review_user_name, r.review_time, r.cancel_time, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from sc_course_selection_request r left join sc_user_profile p on p.user_id = r.student_user_id left join sys_user su on su.user_id = r.student_user_id left join sc_class cls on cls.class_id = p.class_id left join ( select c.id, c.teaching_class_code, c.course_id, case when nullif(trim(c.selection_option_name), '') is null then crs.course_name when c.selection_option_name = crs.course_name then crs.course_name when nullif(trim(crs.course_name), '') is null then c.selection_option_name else concat(crs.course_name, ' / ', c.selection_option_name) end as course_name, c.class_id, cl.class_name, c.teacher_id, c.term_id, t.term_name from sc_class_course c left join sc_course crs on crs.course_id = c.course_id left join sc_class cl on cl.class_id = c.class_id left join sc_school_term t on t.term_id = c.term_id ) cc on cc.id = r.target_class_course_id left join sys_user tu on tu.user_id = cc.teacher_id left join sys_user ru on ru.user_id = r.review_user_id
mapper.delete:
delete from sc_course_selection_request where request_id in
#{requestId}
